endpoints.name: POST /providers/Microsoft.Billing/billingAccounts/{billingAccountName}/billingProfiles/{billingProfileName}/invoiceSections/{invoiceSectionName}/providers/Microsoft.Subscription/createSubscription
endpoints.description: The operation to create a new WebDirect or EA Azure subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INVOICESECTIONNAME}} with a real invoicesectionname. Replace {{BILLINGPROFILENAME}} with a real billingprofilename. Replace {{BILLINGACCOUNTNAME}} with a real billingaccountname.

endpoints.name: POST /providers/Microsoft.Billing/billingAccounts/{billingAccountName}/customers/{customerName}/providers/Microsoft.Subscription/createSubscription
endpoints.description: The operation to create a new CSP subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BILLINGACCOUNTNAME}} with a real billingaccountname. Replace {{CUSTOMERNAME}} with a real customername.

endpoints.name: POST /providers/Microsoft.Billing/enrollmentAccounts/{enrollmentAccountName}/providers/Microsoft.Subscription/createSubscription
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ENROLLMENTACCOUNTNAME}} with a real enrollmentaccountname.

endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Subscription/operations
endpoints.description: Lists all of the available Microsoft.Subscription API operations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Subscription/subscriptionOperations/{operationId}
endpoints.description: Get the status of the pending Microsoft.Subscription API operations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OPERATIONID}} with a real operationid.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Subscription/cancel
endpoints.description: The operation to cancel a subscription
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Subscription/enable
endpoints.description: The operation to enable a subscription
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Subscription/rename
endpoints.description: The operation to rename a subscription
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.
